name: mneme-plugin
description: Distribution repo for the mneme Claude Code plugin. Holds hand-written packaging; the compiled server binary is produced by the mneme code repo and gitignored.

scripts.test: node scripts/validate-manifests.mjs && node scripts/check-skill-names.mjs && node scripts/check-release-pin.mjs && node scripts/check-workflows.mjs && node scripts/check-readme.mjs && sh scripts/check-launcher.sh
